title: restore_lacuna_semantic data payload
description: v0.30 sign2vec-augmented single-position lacuna restorer. Composes v0.18.0's bigram-context score with v0.23.0's sign2vec semantic prior. Joint score = alpha * normalized_bigram + (1-alpha) * normalized_sign2vec. alpha=1 collapses to pure bigram (≈ v0.18 baseline); alpha=0 collapses to pure sign2vec (semantic-only). Returns top-K candidates plus an ablation block exposing the disagreement between the two axes.

tablet_id.description: eBL _id of the tablet whose position was queried, or null if signs were supplied inline.

lacuna_position.description: Index of the predicted position in the tablet's tokenized sign sequence.

surrounding_signs.description: The up-to-4 visible signs adjacent to lacuna_position, walking outward and skipping damage tokens (X / x / ?). Any slot may be null if the lacuna sits near a tablet boundary or the surrounding region is itself damaged.

predictions.description: Candidates ranked by joint score, descending. Length ≤ top_k.

joint_score.description: alpha * normalized_bigram + (1-alpha) * normalized_sign2vec, where each axis is min-max normalized across the candidate pool. Values in [0, 1] when both axes have spread; 0 when one axis is degenerate.

bigram_score.description: Raw (unnormalized) bigram score: sqrt((P(s|left1)+eps) * (P(right1|s)+eps)) with Laplace smoothing. Reported for diagnostic transparency — the joint uses the min-max normalized form.

sign2vec_score.description: Raw cosine similarity between the candidate's sign2vec embedding and the L2-normalized mean of the surrounding signs' embeddings. 0 when the candidate has no embedding or the centroid is empty.

ablation.description: Top-1 from each axis, plus a label classifying how the joint top-1 relates to the two pure axes. Lets the caller diagnose whether sign2vec is adding signal or just echoing the bigram baseline.

pure_bigram_top1.description: Top-1 candidate ranked by normalized bigram score alone (≈ v0.18 baseline output).

pure_sign2vec_top1.description: Top-1 candidate ranked by normalized sign2vec centroid cosine alone.

joint_top1.description: Top-1 candidate ranked by the joint score at the requested alpha.

agreement.description: all_agree: both axes and the joint pick the same top-1. bigram_dominates: joint top-1 matches bigram top-1 but not sign2vec. sign2vec_dominates: joint top-1 matches sign2vec top-1 but not bigram. joint_compromise: joint top-1 is neither axis's top-1 — the convex combination found a different leader. insufficient_signal: candidate pool empty or one of the rankings unavailable.

alpha.description: Weight on the bigram axis in the joint score. Echoed back so callers can confirm clamping behavior.

context_signs_with_embedding.description: How many of the up-to-4 surrounding signs (left2, left1, right1, right2) had a sign2vec embedding and contributed to the centroid.

centroid_dim.description: Dimensionality of the centroid vector (0 when no embeddings were found).

embedding_index_loaded.description: True iff the sign2vec embedding index was successfully loaded for this call.
